'''shabaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicaraven|nicaraven]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicaraven|nicaraven]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shabaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæbæyæth|shæbæyæth]] || [[word:shæbæyæj|shæbæyæj]] || [[word:shæbæyæsh|shæbæyæsh]] || [[word:shæbæyæ|shæbæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shababayath|shababayath]] || [[word:shababayaj|shababayaj]] || [[word:shababayash|shababayash]] || [[word:shababaya|shababaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shabayath|shabayath]] || [[word:shabayaj|shabayaj]] || [[word:shabayash|shabayash]] || [[word:shabaya|shabaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shabafyath|shabafyath]] || [[word:shabafyaj|shabafyaj]] || [[word:shabafyash|shabafyash]] || [[word:shabafyaf|shabafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shabayatha|shabayatha]] || [[word:shabayaja|shabayaja]] || [[word:shabayasha|shabayasha]] || [[word:shabayaka|shabayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shabayath|shabayath]] || [[word:shabayaj|shabayaj]] || [[word:shabayash|shabayash]] || [[word:shabaya|shabaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shabayathal|shabayathal]] || [[word:shabayajal|shabayajal]] || [[word:shabayashal|shabayashal]] || [[word:shabayakal|shabayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shabayathatha|shabayathatha]] || [[word:shabayajaja|shabayajaja]] || [[word:shabayashasha|shabayashasha]] || [[word:shabayaka|shabayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shabayathan|shabayathan]] || [[word:shabayajan|shabayajan]] || [[word:shabayashan|shabayashan]] || [[word:shabayakan|shabayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shabayathaoro|shabayathaoro]] || [[word:shabayajaoro|shabayajaoro]] || [[word:shabayashaoro|shabayashaoro]] || [[word:shabayakaoro|shabayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
